§6Crop Farming§f

§aGrow vegetables, fruits, and berries on farmland for food and ingredients.§f

HarvestCraft adds §e65+ crop types§f. Plant seeds on farmland like vanilla crops. Each crop drops its harvest when mature. Crops restore §e1 hunger, 0.6§f saturation raw — cook or combine them for better food.

§6Basic Crops§f: Asparagus, Beet, Broccoli, Cabbage, Corn, Cucumber, Eggplant, Lettuce, Onion, Peas, Pepper, Radish, Soybean, Spinach, Sweet Potato, Tomato, Turnip, and many more.

Use §bGarden Seeds§f (Arid, Frost, Shaded, Soggy, Tropical, Windy) to grow world-gen garden patches with multiple crop types.

§6Crop Usage§f:
§b• Direct Food§f: Eat raw crops for quick hunger restoration (§e1 hunger§f each).
§b• Grinder§f: Grind grains (Wheat, Barley, Oats, Rye, Corn) into §bFlour§f for baking.
§b• Presser§f: Press crops into juices, cooking oil, tofu, and sugar.
§b• Mortar and Pestle§f: Grind spices (Peppercorn, Cinnamon, Nutmeg) into seasonings.
§b• Cooking Tools§f: Use crops in Skillet, Pot, Cutting Board, and Juicer recipes.

§eTip§f: Set up a §bCrop Farm§f with automated harvesters to feed your food processing line. Combine with a §bGrinder§f and §bPresser§f for a self-sustaining ingredient supply.
